channel.title: Retype News by RSS
channel.description: Latest updates, announcements, and articles from Retype

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.4
item.description: Retype v4.4 is another big release, including two new extensibility features that we have all wanted for a long time. The all new, custom icons deliver
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.3
item.description: Retype v4.3 packs in notable new features and a solid round of enhancements. Header navigation now supports dropdown sub-menu support, backlinks gain fine-grained include and exclude controls, and date formatting is now fully configurable.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.2
item.description: Retype v4.2 adds new RSS controls, customizable labels, new search indexing controls, Card component upgrades, and a few CLI updates that make publishing easier to fine tune.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.1
item.description: Retype v4.1 has been primarily a community-driven release shaped by suggestions and feedback from Retype users. A huge thank you to the Retype community for your contributions and ideas that made it into this release.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: Self-hosting Obsidian Vault with Retype
item.description: If you use Obsidian, chances are you’ve thought about publishing your vault online. Maybe it’s a personal digital garden, a team knowledge base, or project documentation.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v4.0
item.description: Retype v4.0 is here! This major version release brings powerful new components, expanded templating capabilities, and a complete upgrade of all internal libraries and dependencies.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.12
item.description: Retype v3.12 brings powerful new features for content discovery, visual design, and theme customization. This release introduces the Backlinks component for Retype Pro, automatic dark mode image switching, color preview chips, enhanced page descriptions, and comprehensive theming improvements.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.11
item.description: Retype v3.11 puts you in control of your project's visual identity, while keeping everything fast, clean, and easy to use. This release brings Pro-level theme customization, smarter navigation, and faster syntax options to help you create documentation that feels more like your own.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.10
item.description: We're excited to share the latest release of Retype, packed with features that make documentation more flexible and powerful. This release focuses on improving content authoring, navigation control, and extending markdown capabilities.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: New GitHub Pages Community Key
item.description: All projects should have access to professional-grade documentation, no matter their budget. Starting today, the Retype Pro Community Key for GitHub Pages brings Retype’s full feature set to any project published on GitHub Pages, at no cost and with no strings attached.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.9
item.description: Retype v3.9 brings improvements to callout components, broader syntax features to support other systems, enhanced image handling, and better print functionality.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)

item.title: What's New in Retype v3.8
item.description: Retype v3.8 introduces powerful new linking capabilities, enhanced search functionality, and improved content management features. This release focuses on making documentation more interconnected and discoverable while adding modern conveniences for content creators.
item.author: geoff@retype.com (@geoffreymcgill)
